items.title: Federal Open Market Committee reaffirms its "Statement on Longer-Run Goals and Monetary Policy Strategy"
items.summary: Federal Open Market Committee reaffirms its "Statement on Longer-Run Goals and Monetary Policy Strategy"
items.summaryZh: 联邦公开市场委员会重申其《关于长期目标和货币政策策略的声明》
items.summaryEn: Federal Open Market Committee reaffirms its "Statement on Longer-Run Goals and Monetary Policy Strategy"
items.impactZh: 央行政策预期变化可能提升主要货币对波动，杠杆仓位的保证金与回撤压力上升。
items.impactEn: Shifts in central-bank expectations may increase major-pair volatility and raise margin/drawdown pressure on leveraged positions.

items.title: ECB to integrate non-financial credit claim portfolios into general collateral framework, phasing out temporary measures
items.summary: ECB to integrate non-financial credit claim portfolios into general collateral framework, phasing out temporary measures
items.summaryZh: 欧洲央行将把非金融信贷债权组合纳入一般抵押品框架，并逐步取消临时措施
items.summaryEn: ECB to integrate non-financial credit claim portfolios into general collateral framework, phasing out temporary measures
items.impactZh: 央行政策预期变化可能提升主要货币对波动，杠杆仓位的保证金与回撤压力上升。
items.impactEn: Shifts in central-bank expectations may increase major-pair volatility and raise margin/drawdown pressure on leveraged positions.

items.title: ECB reports on progress towards euro adoption
items.summary: ECB reports on progress towards euro adoption
items.summaryZh: 欧洲央行就采用欧元取得的进展发布报告
items.summaryEn: ECB reports on progress towards euro adoption
items.impactZh: 央行政策预期变化可能提升主要货币对波动，杠杆仓位的保证金与回撤压力上升。
items.impactEn: Shifts in central-bank expectations may increase major-pair volatility and raise margin/drawdown pressure on leveraged positions.
